name: Skill Management
description: Manages user-defined custom instruction blocks (skills) that can be toggled on/off and injected into AI task prompts. Supports global and per-project skills with a full CRUD editor dialog.

Dialogs/SkillEditorDialog.cs.content:
class SkillEditorDialog
  L22: Show(SkillManager skillManager, string? projectPath) -> bool  // Shows the full skill manager dialog. Returns true if any changes were made.
  L275: ShowSkillEditDialog(SkillEntry? existing, bool isGlobal, SkillManager skillManager, string? projectPath = null) -> bool  // Shows a dialog to create or edit a single skill. Returns true if saved.

  L124: DeleteSkill(SkillEntry skill, string? projectPath = null) -> void

  L193: GetEnabledSkillIds() -> List<string>
  L197: SetEnabledSkills(IEnumerable<string> skillIds) -> void

class SkillEntry

dependencies: Reads/writes JSON files for skill persistence
